data.title: Wunder.Social Raises $50M Ahead of Token Offer to Build Bot-Free Social Media
data.description:
• A blockchain-based startup in London said it raised $50 million toward its goal reinventing social media.
  • Wunder.Social will attempt to get the ball rolling through a token offer later this month.
  • Ryan Martin, the former head of marketing at TikTok, joined the company as its chief marketing officer.

data.title: Tokenized Funds' Rapid Growth Comes With Red Flags: Moody's
data.description:
• Tokenization of funds have experienced a rapid growth but the novel technology introduces several vulnerabilities, Moody's Ratings said in a report.
  • Fund managers' limited experience and reliance on small teams pose key-man risks, while blockchain disruptions, redemptions mechanisms and legal challenges across jurisdictions add to the concerns, the report added.

data.title: Trump-Backed World Liberty Financial Begins Selling ETH as Losses Top $125M
data.description:
• A wallet linked to World Liberty Financial sold $8 million worth of ether after racking up a $125 million loss.
  • WLFI's main wallet still holds $98 million worth of crypto including $11 million in ether.
  • The sale comes two months after Eric Trump, the president's son, said it was a "great time to buy ETH."

data.title: Shiba Inu’s 16% Plunge Tied to U.S.-China Tensions May be Short-Lived
data.description:
• President Trump's tariff plans triggered a market-wide crypto selloff, pushing SHIB to a 13-month low of $0.00001038 despite Shibarium reaching a 1 billion transaction milestone.
  • China responds with 34% retaliatory tariffs, intensifying global trade tensions and causing investors to unwind positions in risk assets, including cryptocurrencies.
  • SHIB forms double bottom pattern around $0.00001050 support level with bullish momentum building as price reclaims $0.00001097 amid increased trading volume.

data.title: First XRP ETF in U.S. Racks up $5M on Debut in Teucrium's 'Most Successful Launch'
data.description:
• Teucrium's 2x Long Daily XRP ETF debuted with $5 million in trading volume, ranking it among the top 5% of new ETF launches.
  • The ETF aims to deliver twice the daily returns of XRP through swap agreements, using European exchange-traded products as reference rates.
  • Teucrium plans to introduce an inverse XRP ETF to allow investors to profit from XRP price drops, pending demand assessment.

data.title: This Bitcoin Hedge Fund Is Taking Treasuries Companies Global: Blockspace
data.description:
• 210k Capital, a Bitcoin-focused hedge fund, returned 164% in 2024, making it the fifth best performing single major hedge fund according to HFR.
  • The fund's success is attributed to investments in bitcoin strategy companies like Strategy and Metaplanet, which offer securitized bitcoin exposure.
  • UTXO Management plans to expand bitcoin treasury companies globally, targeting markets such as Latin America, the Middle East, and Asia.

data.title: Binance's Second Reward-Bearing Asset LDUSDT to Launch Soon
data.description:
• Binance Futures will introduce LDUSDT, a reward-bearing margin asset that accrues rewards to holders.
  • Traders can swap their tether (USDT) for LDUSDT on Binance's Simple Earn Flexible Product to use as margin for futures trading.

data.title: UK Bond Yields Hit 5.5%, Stirring ‘Memories of 2022 Pension Crisis’
data.description:
• UK 30-year gilt yield surges to 5.5%, the highest since 1998, reviving fears of pension fund instability seen during the 2022 LDI crisis.
  • Trump's proposed tariffs are rattling bond markets, threatening to trigger another round of financial stress.
  • Bitcoin can serve as a diversifying asset in portfolios amid rising global bond yields, according to Bytree founder Charlie Morris.

data.title: China Strikes Back With 84% Tariff on U.S. Goods, Bitcoin Dips Below $76,000
data.description:
• China raises tariffs on all U.S. imports from 34% to 84%, matching the U.S.’s latest move.
  • Bitcoin drops below $76,000 as markets react to fears of prolonged trade conflict.

data.title: How DeFi 'Defied' Market Carnage as Traders Poured Millions Amid Panic
data.description:
• Aave hit a record high in deposits, hitting 11 million ETH despite the market plunge.
  • Decentralized exchange volumes are also up this week.
  • The increased activity demonstrates a coming of age period for DeFi as traders look to de-risk and find delta neutral yields.
